zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Willoughby於大約1300年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾洛維爾 恩時，她的父親Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby28歲，母親Baroness Margaret Deincourt25歲。她和Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1357年在英國斯塔福爾霍普頓享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Willoughby于大约1300年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾洛維爾 恩时，她的父亲Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby28岁，母亲Baroness Margaret Deincourt25岁。她和Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1357年在英国斯塔福爾霍普頓享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Willoughby was born about 1300, in Lower Tean, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby, was 28 and her mother, Baroness Margaret Deincourt, was 25. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight. She died in 1357, in Hopton, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Willoughby est née environ 1300, à Lower Tean, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Baroness Margaret Deincourt, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight. Elle est décédée en 1357, à Hopton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Willoughby um 1300 in Lower Tean, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby 28 und ihre Mutter Baroness Margaret Deincourt 25. Sie hatte mit Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1357 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Hopton, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Willoughby è nata il circa 1300 nel Lower Tean, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Baroness Margaret Deincourt, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight. Morì nel 1357, nel Hopton, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Willoughbyが約1300年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアロウエル テアンで生まれた時，父Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresbyは28歳，母Baroness Margaret Deincourtは25歳であった。彼女はSir Robert III de Beke, Knightとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1357年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアホープトンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Willoughby(이)가 대략 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 로어 테아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Margaret Deincourt(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1357년 영국 스태퍼드실르 홉턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Willoughby родилась около 1300 г. в местности лоуир тин, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Margaret Deincourt, 25. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight. Она умерла в 1357 г. в местности хоптон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.
